title: CrashFixer
description: A simple mod that fixes a few crash exploits in the game
body:
### CrashFixer

**CrashFixer** is a lightweight mod that prevents Minecraft from crashing due to broken, missing, or corrupted text (like item names, tooltips, or translations). Instead of a crash, affected names or messages are simply hidden—letting you keep playing without interruption. No configuration needed: just install and enjoy a more stable Minecraft experience!
